comment: Synthetic Stage IV cutaneous melanoma, 56F, ECOG 1, BRAF V600E confirmed by tissue NGS (PCR-orthogonal). Symptomatic CNS metastases with high LDH and rapid radiologic progression — visceral-crisis equivalent driving 1L BRAFi+MEKi over IO-doublet per DREAMseq. Engine routes ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L step 0 (KIT-mut absent) → step 1 (RF-MELANOMA-BRAF-V600-ACTIONABLE fires on braf_v600e_mutation=true) → step 2 (RF-MELANOMA-TRANSFORMATION-PROGRESSION fires on symptomatic_cns_metastases=true) → IND-MELANOMA-BRAF-METASTATIC-1L-DABRA-TRAME (dabrafenib+trametinib, COMBI-d/v mPFS ~12 mo). Aggressive plan-track. NCCN cat 1.
